title: Fit-to-screen option for viewing Kanban tasks if additional statuses are added
excerpt: On the Kanban screen, tt would be great to have the option to fit-to-screen if there are additional statuses added to prevent the necessity of scrolling horizontally to view all tasks in status columns.

posts.author: cfreemansa (Claudie Freeman)
posts.cookedHtml: On the Kanban screen, tt would be great to have the option to fit-to-screen if there are additional statuses added to prevent the necessity of scrolling horizontally to view all tasks in status columns.
